title: SALT Fairness for Working Families Act
short_title: SALT Fairness for Working Families Act
stage_label: Referred to the House Committee on Ways and Means.
crs_summary: SALT Fairness for Working Families Act This bill increases the limitation on the federal tax deduction for state and local taxes (commonly known as the SALT deduction cap) to $15,000 ($30,000 for married individuals filing a joint federal income tax return).  Under current law, the SALT deduction cap is $10,000 ($5,000 for a married individuals filing separate federal income tax returns).
last_action_text: Referred to the House Committee on Ways and Means.
